{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Katy

|desc={{p|Nymble}} is Katy's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Sprigatito}}, where it used hit-and-run tactics to bewilder its opponent. Eventually, it was defeated after Sprigatito used {{m|Leafage}} to conceal its movements and launch a sneak attack.

None of Nymble's moves are known.}}
